label: Uncomplicated bruise or contusion without fracture or bleeding risk
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated bruise or soft-tissue contusion.
No fracture/dislocation concern, compartment syndrome, neurovascular compromise, anticoagulation/bleeding disorder, non-accidental trauma concern, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Fracture, dislocation, open wound, severe pain, compartment syndrome, neurovascular compromise, inability to use limb, or high-energy trauma.
Anticoagulation, bleeding disorder, unexplained bruising, abuse/assault concern, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed orthopedic plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, urgent care, occupational health, or orthopedics if pain, swelling, or function is not improving.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports bruise/contusion framing, expected pain/swelling/color-change course, and simple supportive care. Autonomous Phase 1751-1800 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated bruise/contusion without fracture/dislocation concern, compartment syndrome, neurovascular compromise, open wound, high-energy mechanism, anticoagulation/bleeding disorder, unexplained bruising or abuse concern, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports bruise/contusion framing, expected pain/swelling/color-change course, and simple supportive care. Autonomous Phase 1751-1800 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated bruise/contusion without fracture/dislocation concern, compartment syndrome, neurovascular compromise, open wound, high-energy mechanism, anticoagulation/bleeding disorder, unexplained bruising or abuse concern, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated bruise or soft-tissue contusion
no fracture, dislocation, neurovascular compromise, bleeding disorder, or anticoagulation documented
no open wound, high-energy mechanism, abuse concern, pregnancy, pediatric, or specialist-directed pathway
